message:
fix(tls,scheduler): handle rustls Ok(0) write and reduce idle CPU

TLS: When rustls Writer::write() returns Ok(0) because its internal
plaintext buffer is full, flush pending TLS records and retry instead
of propagating Ok(0) upstream where write_all() would convert it to
a fatal WriteZero error. This matches the tokio-rustls approach.

Scheduler: Increase worker park_timeout from 1ms to 25ms. The 1ms
timeout caused ~1000 wake-ups/sec per idle worker (~3% CPU each),
which adds up significantly in multi-agent deployments. 25ms reduces
idle CPU by ~25x while remaining responsive to shutdown signals.

Closes #4, closes #5

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
